Usage:
  circleci signing-config [command]

Available Commands:
  create      Create an iOS signing config
  delete      Delete an iOS signing config
  list        List iOS signing configs

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci signing-config [command] --help" for more information about a command.
